entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop genotypes evaluated for salinity tolerance

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A major environmental constraint characterized by high salt concentration, specifically 150 mM NaCl in this study

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of plant genotypes to maintain growth and yield under salt-stressed environments

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant, which is reduced in salt-sensitive genotypes

entities.name: SHOOT GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the above-ground part of the plant, which is reduced in salt-sensitive genotypes

entities.name: IN VITRO SCREENING
entities.description: Laboratory-based screening at the seedling stage to identify salt-tolerant genotypes

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method (ANOVA) used to confirm genetic diversity for salt tolerance

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method (PCA) used to identify key contributing traits for stress tolerance

entities.name: MULTIPLE STRESS INDICES
entities.description: Indices used to cluster genotypes based on their response to salinity stress

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of physiological and chemical components to confirm salt tolerance mechanisms

entities.name: MOLECULAR ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of gene expression and molecular markers to understand salt tolerance

entities.name: OSMOLYTES
entities.description: Small organic molecules that help plants maintain osmotic balance under salinity stress

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes that protect plants by neutralizing reactive oxygen species

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION PROFILING
entities.description: The measurement of transcript levels of specific genes to determine their role in stress response

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene (CAT) involved in the scavenging of reactive oxygen species

entities.name: GLUTAMATE DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene (GDH) that acts as a reactive oxygen species scavenger under salinity

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE REDUCTASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene (GR) involved in the antioxidant defense system

entities.name: NITRATE REDUCTASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene (NR) that acts as a reactive oxygen species scavenger under salinity

entities.name: REACTIVE OXYGEN SPECIES
entities.description: Chemically reactive oxygen-containing molecules that cause cellular damage under stress

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: High-throughput biological analysis used for candidate gene mining

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE MINING
entities.description: The process of identifying specific genes responsible for a trait to develop resilient crops

relationships.description: aims toward development of resilient crops
